text: Drone Registration Service Thailand Zum Inhalt springen Drone Registration Service Thailand Register your drone in Thailand through us, hassle-free Are you visiting Thailand and want to fly your drone? Do you find the websites, rules, and regulations complicated? Don’t have a Thai phone number needed for the CAAT-registration? We’re Thaifreude, and we’re experts in helping foreign tourists register their drone in Thailand. If any of these apply to you, our drone registration service is the perfect choice. We know the requirements of the CAAT and NBTC and know exactly what documents they need and in what format. My Thai wife, Mild, can communicate directly with the relevant authorities in case of issues, and I am available to assist you with any questions. We also provide support with the currently required flight registration using the UAS Portal app. We will provide you with login details and a manual with detailed instructions and tips for the flight registration. Your Benefits When Using Our Service Guarantee of Issuance English, German, and Thai-speaking customer support CAAT registration possible before entry to Thailand! CAAT certificate within 24 hours No Thai phone number needed Receive CAAT registration number via email and registered mail within Thailand No need to answer the 40 questions for the CAAT drone registration Documents prepared by us We speak Thai and can communicate directly with the authorities in their native language Legal drone operation shortly after arrival No wasted time due to incorrect applications Applications processed within 24 hours of payment receipt Reachable during business hours via email, chat, or WhatsApp What Our Clients Say About Us To our Google Maps profile Would you also like to let go of your worries for a fair price and let us handle the applications? Fill out the form , and we’ll get back to you. Price List Service Fee Drone Application (for one drone) 3000 THB (900 THB upfront, 2100 THB after CAAT registration) Each additional drone 1275 THB NBTC fee (214 THB ) Included Thai phone number for registration Provided by us Receiving CAAT registration number via email and also registered mail within Thailand Drone Insurance ( mandatory, but you can use other insurance as well ) For up to 3 months: 900 THB (German residents) For up to 12 months: 1300 THB (All nationalities) Only NBTC registration 1275 THB Additional permits (national park, air force etc.) 500 THB per permit * Payment can be made in 40+ different currencies via Wise. Currencies include: EUR, USD, THB, GBP, AUD, NZD, TRY, PLN, NOK, SEK, DKK, AED, HUF, ZAR Application Form If you would like us to handle your drone registration, please fill out the form below. The details are required for the application. If you encounter any problems , please send us an email to drohne@thaifreu.de , we’re happy to help ! Your Name (Required) Salutation (Required) Mr. Ms. Your Email Address (Required) Your Phone Number (Required) Name of your hotel in Thailand? (Required) When do you want to enter? (Required) What is the brand of your drone? e.g., DJI, Potensic (Required) What is your drone model? e.g., Mini 3 Pro, Mavic Pro, Atom (Required) Do you need insurance? No Yes I agree to the processing of my data for the drone registration application. We will delete all your information and documents immediately after issuing the CAAT and NBTC confirmations. (Required) Additional information for us (optional) You’ll receive further information, including payment details and next steps, via email during our business hours from 10:00 – 17:00 Thai time. Sometimes our email might end up in the spam folder, so please check there too. You can send the required documents for your application via email drohne@thaifreu.de or WhatsApp. Process We can complete the CAAT registration for you at any time, and it will be ready immediately. The NBTC registration typically takes 1–3 working days. Here’s how our Thailand Drone Service works: Fill out our application form You start by completing our application form. We send you an email You’ll receive an email from us with all the required information, documents, and our bank account details. Send us the required documents and make an initial payment Send us all the completed documents and transfer 900฿ (+ the cost of insurance, if desired). We complete the CAAT registration After successfully completing the CAAT registration, we’ll send you a screenshot. (Optional: If you choose to include insurance, we’ll send the insurance documents at this stage.) Make the remaining payment Transfer the remaining 2100฿ to us. We send the CAAT registration documents You’ll receive the documents related to your CAAT registration. Before entry: We send your drone’s registration sticker Shortly before your trip, we’ll send our self-printed registration sticker with the CAAT registration number of your drone to the address in Thailand you provide (you also receive the number via email). After entry: You send us the entry stamp Once you’ve entered Thailand, send us a copy of your entry stamp. We complete the NBTC registration We’ll handle the NBTC registration and send you the NBTC certificate along with all the other registration documents within 1–3 working days. Additional Notes You never need to provide a Thai phone number! We’ll keep you updated throughout the entire application process and are always available to answer any questions. Required Documents for Registration Please send us the following documents at drohne@thaifreu.de after you’ve submitted your Application Form and received your reply: Photo of your passport data page Photo of the visa confirmation (if available) Photo of the entry stamp (after arrival) Address in Thailand, preferably outside of Bangkok, as the processing times there are long (e.g., accommodation booking confirmation, address of friends/relatives, etc.) Photo of the drone (showing the entire drone) Photo of the QR code and serial number of the drone Photo of the QR code and serial number of the drone controller Drone insurance confirmation in English, it has to include: Start date End date Policy number Mention of coverage „worldwide“ or „Thailand“ Insurance sum (min. 1 000 000 THB) Mention of „drone“ being covered Your name Sales contract or invoice for buying the drone Guarantee of Issuance When you register your drone through us, we guarantee that your drone will be ready for use in time for your holiday. Here are the conditions: You send us all required documents at least 3 days before departure. All information you provide is truthful. How Long Does the Registration Process Take? We process every drone application within 24 hours of receiving payment, provided all documents are complete. The NBTC application is submitted immediately after receiving the entry stamp. The CAAT registration is available instantly The NBTC processes applications in about 1–3 working days after your arrival (as the entry stamp is required). Contact & Closing If you have any questions about the application process, feel free to contact us during business hours via email at drohne@thaifreu.de , live chat or via WhatsApp at +49 15679 505478 . Once we’ve received your documents and payment, and if there are no questions from our side, we’ll submit the applications for you. As soon as the confirmations for successful registration with both authorities are issued, we’ll send them to you via the communication channel we’ve been using with you. Wir sind Max & Mild Wir leben in Thailand und begleiten seit Jahren Kunden bei Visum, Drohnenregistrierung und Tierimport. Du profitierst von erprobten Abläufen, klaren Anforderungen und einer effizienten Umsetzung. Zu unseren Services WordPress Cookie Plugin von Real Cookie Banner
